Simulated data generation with seed=42; 1083 heat pump 'on' periods have elec_w >= 50W
Simulated data generation with seed=42; average COP of 1083 valid points is 2.99 (rounded to 2 decimals)

Simulated data generation with seed=42; minimum COP value is 1.81 (rounded to 2 decimals)

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data generated with Python (seed=42) simulating 24 hours of heat pump operation at 1-minute intervals. The setup script creates two feeds (heatpump_elec and heatpump_heat) with 1440 data points each. Ground truth statistics are stored at /var/lib/emoncms/cop_ground_truth.json with 1083 valid COP points (where electrical power >= 50W). Expected ground truth values: average COP = 2.99, max COP = 4.2, min COP = 1.81. The agent must write its report to /home/ga/cop_report.txt with exactly 5 lines containing feed ID, data point count, average COP, maximum COP, and minimum COP.
